panels.description: Requests per second handled by each API VM behind Nginx. This is the primary load-balancer distribution panel.

panels.description: HTTP requests per second observed by Nginx on the public load balancer.

panels.description: Current active client connections on the Nginx load balancer.

panels.description: Nginx connection state gauges: reading request, writing response, and idle keep-alive waiting.
panels.title: LB Connection State

panels.description: Accepted and handled Nginx client connections per second. Divergence indicates connection handling pressure.
panels.title: LB Accepted vs Handled Connections

panels.description: Prometheus scrape health for the Nginx exporter on the load balancer.
panels.title: LB Exporter Health
